title: Korbond - Tapestry/Cross Stitch Needles
features: Extra long eye for wools and thick yarns
Blunt point especially for use on canvas
description: Product description Korbond ball point tapestry needles are specially designed to enable the needle to pass through canvas without tearing or splitting its fibres. These large eyed needles allow the user to easily thread tapestry wool or Korbond Embroidery Floss. Pack Contains 6 Needles, Size 18/24 Manufacturer Contact Information Authorised Representative Service, 77 Camden Street Lower, Dublin, D02 XE80, Ireland.
